archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Gen Z Bold accents

design_philosophy.emotion: Approachable, energetic, trustworthy, and heavily eco-conscious.
design_philosophy.concept: Modern & Minimal combined with Bold & Vibrant. We are fusing the calm, grounding nature of sustainable earth tones with the electric, disruptive energy of Gen Z thrifting and barter economy.
key_principles: Negative Space: Use generous padding (p-8, p-12) to let the products breathe.
Contrast: Pair deep forest greens and earth tones with electric lime for CTA impact.
Typography as Art: Use bold, tightly tracked sans-serif headers (Cabinet Grotesk/Clash Display) against simple, legible body text.
Bento Grids: Utilize asymmetric grids for the marketplace discovery and swap calculator sections.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold leading-tight
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for distinct content blocks.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and badges to soften the brutalist typography.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C2FF41] text-[#171A18] hover:bg-[#A8E52A] rounded-full font-bold px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#24402E] text-white hover:bg-[#1A2E21] rounded-full font-semibold px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#24402E] text-[#24402E] rounded-full font-semibold px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#24402E] hover:text-white transition-colors

cards.product: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 border border-[#DCD9CE] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] transition-all group

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F7F6F2]/80 border-b border-[#DCD9CE]/50 py-4

chat.bubble_received: bg-white border border-[#DCD9CE] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 text-[#171A18]

badges.sustainable: bg-[#C2FF41]/20 text-[#24402E] text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-1 rounded-full
badges.value_score: bg-[#DE6B48] text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-lg

hero.description: Dynamic, vibrant Gen Z sustainable fashion hero banner

abstract_background.usage: Background texture for swap calculator or CTA section

community_lifestyle.usage: About us or 'How it works' section

icons.style: Clean, line-based icons. Use stroke-width: 2. For dense marketplace filters, ensure icons are minimal.

usage: Hover states on product cards: image zoom (scale: 1.05) combined with subtle translateY.
Staggered entrance for bento grid items and product listings.
Page transitions: soft fade and slide up.
Chat messages: Spring animation on appear.

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, forms, chat send button, swap request actions) MUST include data-testid attributes formatted in kebab-case representing their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML+Tailwind for Landing Page custom bento sections; DO NOT restrict yourself to Shadcn rigid cards here.
For the Swap Value Calculator Widget, use the bento card style. Pair the AI estimation logic with a clean loading skeleton state.
Apply 'Generous Spacing Philosophy'. Do not cramp elements. If you use standard Shadcn inputs, wrap them in padded containers.
For the Real-time Chat page, use the 'Control Room' dense grid approach (sidebar for chat list, main area for chat window). Ensure clear hierarchy.
The Hero Section should feature the `hero` image with an overlay of NO MORE THAN bg-white/20 if using light text, or rely on negative space if positioning text outside the image.
NEVER use generic placeholder image URLs (like via.placeholder). ONLY use the media URLs provided in this JSON.
Ensure all buttons use the color/contrast specified. Electric Lime (#C2FF41) must have dark text (#171A18) for accessibility.
